lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Hi [player name]. You woke me up, I was fast asleep!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I didn't realise you were sleeping. I just wanted to say hello.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Hello then. Can I help you with anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, that's it. You can go back to sleep, sorry to have disturbed you.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: It's no problem.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Hello [player name]. Did you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing important. I'd like to ask you a question if that is okay?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Ask away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why did you pick the kitchen as your spot to sleep? It must get quite noisy sometimes?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: It does during meal times, but it's also lovely and warm near the fire, and look at all the food!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good point. Now it seems like the best spot in the house!

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: You catch on quickly, for a human! Now I am going to go back to sleep, unless there is something else I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That was all I wanted to ask, thank you.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Oh, hello [player name]. Did I hear a bark?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A bark? Is there a dog here?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: There is, sometimes...

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: It always wakes me up with its barking.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: It seems to come and go. I can't figure out why or how.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That is indeed strange. I'll keep an eye out for it.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: There it is again, did you hear it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can't say I did.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Maybe I'm imagining it.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Hi [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: I'm okay, thank you. I've been enjoying the piano playing. Was it you playing earlier?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that wasn't me.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Must have been Gem then. She often plays the piano when she thinks nobody is listening.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: She's actually quite good.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have to keep an ear out.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Hi there, [player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have another question for you, if that is okay?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Go ahead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you ever leave the hall? I've only ever seen you in here.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: I do sometimes. If I do go out, it's normally at night.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: I much prefer it in here though. Nice and warm with good food. There is even a bank, if I ever needed a bank for anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fair enough. The world can be a pretty scary place out there anyway.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Exactly. It's much nicer to relax here, even with the occasional adventurer disturbing me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That'll be me! Sorry, I'll let you get back to sleep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there, Hannibal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I should give him some fish from my inventory!

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Purr!

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Purpurr

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Puuurrrrr!

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Thank you [player name]. That's very tasty, though it would be even more tasty if it was cooked.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You prefer cooked food?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: I do. Why do you think I'm in the kitchen? All this lovely food being cooked all the time!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That is a good point. I will see if I can find you something cooked.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: I look forward to it. You know where to find me.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Thank you [player name]. That was lovely! Do you have any more?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You just ate the entire thing, and you're still hungry?

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Sleeping is hungry work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I do often wake up hungry, maybe you're on to something.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see if I can find you something else.

lines.speaker: Hannibal
lines.text: Lovely, I'll be right here, working hard.
